true_header: Non disclosure agreement
Introduction
Are referring to the letter of agreement between nmod and gi concerning industrial participation in further development of gripen and related projects (the "loa");
Noting their wish to exchange  information  for the  purpose of conducting evaluations  of the gripen aircraft,
Noting that such exchange  of information  may involve the disclosure  of confidential  information  by either  party,

Noting that exchanging  information with  gi shall also include exchanging information  with  saab and upon such disclosure  saab shall confirm  and be bound of the terms and conditions  contained  herein as if saab was a party to the  nda;

Noting that  exchanging  information with the  nmod shall also include other  norwegian authorities  and upon such disclosure  said norwegian authority  shall confirm  and be bound of the terms and conditions contained  herein as if said norwegian authority was a party to the  nda.
Clause 1
Clause 2

That it shall treat the confidential  information directly or indirectly disclosed to it by the  disclosing  party as strictly confidential  and will  not without obtaining  the  prior written  consent  of the  disclosing  party disclose  any part of the confidential  information to any third  party,
That it shall not make  use of any part of  the confidential information disclosed to it by the disclosing party,
That it shall give access to the  confidential  information only,
That it shall  not copy or reproduce  in any form  any of the confidential information  disclosed  to it by the  disclosing  party,
That it shall  keep a current  record of all copies and reproductions  of the confidential  information.
Clause 3
At the time of disclosure  or thereafter  available to the  public generally through  no failure  on the  part of the  receiving party;
Known to the  receiving party at the time of its disclosure;
Disclosed to the  receiving party by a third party having the  right to disclose confidential  information  and without  restrictions  as to use or disclosure;
Developed  independently  by the  receiving party without  use of or reference  to the confidential  information  received.

Non-disclosure agreement
By being granted conditional access to the information indicated above,
Hereby agree that i will not alter or remove markings,
Hereby agree that i shall promptly report to the appropriate official,
If i violate the terms and conditions of this agreement,
With respect to ssi and sbu,
Each provision of this agreement is severable.
These restrictions are consistent with and do not supersede, conflict with,
Represent and warrant that i have the authority to enter into this agreement.
Have read this agreement carefully and my questions, if any, have been answered.

Confidentiality and non-disclosure agreement
Table of contents
Interpretation
Unless inconsistent with the context,
“agreement” means this agreement and all amendments thereof;
“confidential information” means any confidential information,
“disclosing party” means the party disclosing confidential information;
“receiving party” means the party receiving confidential information;
“client” means client name,
Unless inconsistent with the context, an expression which denotes –
Any one gender includes the other gender;
Natural person includes a juristic person, partnership,
The singular includes the plural and vice versa .
Unless specifically otherwise provided,
Where figures are referred to in numerals and in words,
The rule of construction that, in the event of ambiguity,

Aspiegel nda template
Confidentiality and non-disclosure agreement
Between:
Aspiegel  limited ,
Insert the other party’s name or company name ,
Whereas
Each  party  wishes  to  disclose  to  the  other  party  confidential  information  in  relation  to  the purpose.
In consideration of the benefits to the parties of the disclosure of the confidential information,
Now it is hereby agreed as follows: -
Definitions and interpretation
The fact that discussions and negotiations are taking place concerning the purpose and the status of those discussions and negotiations;
The existence and terms of this agreement;
Any information relating to:
The  business,  affairs,  customers,  clients,  suppliers,
The  operations,  processes,  product  information,  know-how,
Any information or analysis derived from confidential information.
Confidentiality undertaking
To keep secret and confidential all confidential information of the disclosing party;

To use or apply the confidential information of the  disclosing  party solely for the purpose and  so  as  to  determine  whether  or  not  and  on  what  terms  the  parties  might  wish  to proceed;
Not to use, copy, adapt, alter,
Not  at  any  time,
To  provide  proper  and  secure  storage  for  each  and  every  part  of  the  confidential information received by it in tangible form whilst it is in its custody,

To return  or  destroy  or  if  stored  in  electronic  form  to erase  from  its systems  (to the  extent possible)  at  its  own  expense  the  confidential  information  of  the  disclosing  party  together with any copies in its possession or in the possession of its representatives at the request of the disclosing party.
Disclosure to third parties
Limitation

Is  or  becomes  generally  available  to  the  public  other  than  as  a  result  of  its  disclosure  by the  recipient  party  or  its  representatives  in  breach  of  this  agreement  or  of  any  other undertaking of confidentiality addressed to the party to whom the information relates;
Is  in  its  possession  or  known  to  it  by  being  in  its  use  or  being  recorded  in  its  files  or computers  or  other  recording  media,
Was obtained legally from any third party,
Is  developed  by  the  recipient  party  independently  of  the  information  disclosed  by  the disclosing party.
The recipient party may disclose confidential information to the extent required:
By any  order  of any court  of competent jurisdiction or any competent judicial,
By  the  rules  of  any  listing  authority,
By applicable laws or regulations,
No rights in and no warranty on confidential information
Term and termination
If  either  party  decides  not  to become,
Remedies
Entire agreement and variation
No waiver
Assignment
Notices
No partnership
Third party rights
